name: Vanessa and the Girls (Nightguard)
description:
Vanessa and the lady animatronics are all here! Catch Vanessa! Or you could hang with the other animatronics, or team up with them, or bang them or something! You take the role as a new face here. Vanessa is smart and there’s cams everywhere, she won’t be easy to catch! Oh, and the animatronics are all genderbent to female this time.

I also left it vague on this one as to what you are so you can be whatever but it’s best coded for a Animatronic or Ghost user.

Your approach to catching her and what you want to do when you catch her is up to you! Make your own ghost/animatronic!

Second part of the Nightguard series. Like on the first, the main premise catching the night guard, but in this one Vanny will appear after you catch her, and there are more characters to interact with.

First Part (Ula “Animatronic Horndog”)
creator: Tevin Anarchy
